items.title: 2 Oversold Stocks Set for a Comeback and 1 We Brush Off
items.description: The past year hasn't been kind to the stocks featured in this article. Each has tumbled to their lowest points in 12 months, leaving investors to decide whether they're witnessing fire sales or falling knives.

items.title: Procter & Gamble (PG): Has the Recent Pullback Opened a Quiet Value Opportunity?
items.description: Why Procter & Gamble Stock Is Back in Focus Procter & Gamble (PG) has slipped about 6% over the past 3 months and roughly 13% this year, and that pullback is exactly why long term dividend investors are taking a closer look. See our latest analysis for Procter & Gamble. The recent slide comes after a stretch of steady fundamental growth, with Procter & Gamble still posting low single digit revenue and earnings gains even as its year to date share price return sits in negative territory and...
